calibration.method: Bayesian MCMC (CmdStanR + brms) and quantile regression
calibration.notes: Calibration based on FIA data. 6 of 7 component models integrated (tree: DG, H-D, HG, mortality, CR; stand: SDIMAX, BAMAX).

diameter_growth.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

height_growth.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

height_diameter.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

height_crown_base.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

mortality.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

crown_recession.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

definitions.mort_multiplier: mortality-rate ratio from survival logit incl species RE
definitions.dds_multiplier: DG intercept-shift exp(delta b0); dense index, approximate, adopted variants only
definitions.htg_multiplier: HI intercept-shift exp(delta b0); dense index, approximate, adopted variants only

repo.note: Confirm release tag/commit with Greg Johnson before production

climate_dependency.definition: EMT and TD = MWMT - MCMT from ClimateNA 1991-2020 normals at the stand; engine must supply per stand

crown.note: Greg repo has no fitted crown-change equation; CR recession uses the fvs-conus kernel (disclosed)

species_fallback.rule: species outside Greg's fitted sets use the fvs-conus trait / softwood-hardwood median fallback
species_fallback.expected_fraction: ~0.09 to 0.11 of trees, logged per stand

stand_level.note: density is emergent from the cch-gompit mortality; no fvs-conus Garcia self-thinning / BA carrying-capacity overlay. Optional softened SDIMAX cap only.
